summary: Active exploitation of Fortinet SSL-VPN CVE-2024-21762 observed against financial services and fintech firms in the Gulf region. Initial access leads to internal lateral movement and ransomware staging.
Same CrimsonJackal campaign also exploiting Fortinet authentication bypass CVE-2024-55591 in parallel with CVE-2024-21762 for redundant access.
Campaign targets internet-facing customer portals running vulnerable web frameworks. CVE-SYN-2026-0001 observed in exploitation attempts across UAE-hosted portals.
Researchers have observed proof-of-concept exploitation of API authentication bypass vulnerabilities against exposed payment and identity gateways. No confirmed ransomware link.
RedMantis is actively exploiting project management and collaboration platforms to reach engineering credentials and deployment artifacts. Ransomware deployment follows within 48-72 hours of access.
Same RedMantis campaign also exploiting Confluence RCE CVE-2023-22527. Victims include engineering-heavy SaaS firms in MENA region.
RedMantis also targeting Confluence broken access control CVE-2023-22515 to reach internal spaces containing credentials and architecture diagrams.
Attackers are targeting CI/CD systems to steal source code and deployment secrets. Exposed build variables and hardcoded credentials are the primary vector.
SilentForge also exploiting JetBrains TeamCity CVE-2024-27198 authentication bypass to access build pipelines and extract secrets.
Jenkins CVE-2024-23897 arbitrary file read actively leveraged by SilentForge to extract secrets.json, credentials.xml and SSH keys from build servers.
Adversaries scanning for misconfigured cloud storage and backup systems. Goal is to identify restorable backups that can support extortion and double-extortion ransomware.
Threat group targeting HR portals and employee data. CVE-2025-0333 file upload vulnerability exploited for initial access to extract payroll and PII data.
AmberFox also observed leveraging PHP CGI injection CVE-2024-4577 on HR portal systems running PHP.
Ransomware affiliates chaining PostgreSQL privilege escalation CVE-2024-10978 with lateral movement to internal databases. Finance and payment databases are primary targets.
Automated botnet scanning for outdated CMS installations. Targets are primarily opportunistic — corporate websites and marketing CMSes.
Same GrayLotus botnet also exploiting PHP CVE-2024-4577 on CMS hosts. High volume but lower sophistication.
IronVeil group actively exploiting Citrix NetScaler CitrixBleed CVE-2023-4966 to harvest session tokens from load balancers protecting financial portals. Tokens used to bypass MFA.
IronVeil also targeting payment API IDOR vulnerabilities in tandem with CitrixBleed to escalate access post-session-hijack.
Multiple threat actors exploiting Microsoft Exchange CVE-2024-21410 to relay NTLMv2 hashes. Internal privilege escalation follows. No ransomware link confirmed.
PhantomGrid targeting SolarWinds Web Help Desk via CVE-2024-28986 Java deserialization RCE. MSPs and enterprise IT teams are primary victims — lateral movement to connected endpoints follows.
PhantomGrid chaining hardcoded credentials CVE-2024-28987 with RCE CVE-2024-28986 on SolarWinds WHD. Complete system takeover possible without prior credentials.
Missing endpoint controls observed on executive and operations workstations. Increases blast radius if user credentials are phished or credentials leaked via NTLM relay.

WinterViper group targeting exposed API gateway admin interfaces, particularly Kong. Exploitation provides full control over all proxied routes, enabling traffic interception and partner impersonation.
Opportunistic actors targeting Windows Server 2012 R2 end-of-support systems. No vendor patches available — exploitation is persistent and low-effort.
Security researchers and opportunistic attackers scanning for exposed Kubernetes dashboards. Unauthenticated access enables full cluster takeover.
Spear phishing campaign impersonating bank transfer requests targeting CFO and finance teams in Gulf region. No technical CVE — initial vector is email.
Malicious npm packages mimicking popular libraries observed. No confirmed packages in TawasolPay SBOM — monitor for dependency confusion attacks.
CeruleanFang exploiting Palo Alto PAN-OS CVE-2024-3400 command injection. No PAN-OS assets identified in current inventory — monitor if network stack changes.
Ongoing mass exploitation of MOVEit Transfer CVE-2023-34362. No MOVEit assets in current environment. Relevant if third-party file transfer vendors are used.
Mass exploitation of ConnectWise ScreenConnect auth bypass. No ScreenConnect in current inventory. Relevant if remote support vendors use this tooling.
IcedThread exploiting Ivanti Connect Secure stack overflow. No Ivanti assets in current inventory — Fortinet is the VPN platform in use.
Weaponized exploitation of Apache Struts file upload RCE. No Struts applications identified in current inventory.
High-volume credential stuffing observed against payment portal login pages in UAE. Automated tools using breached credential lists. Relevant to Customer Login and Payment Processing.
Proof-of-concept for OpenSSL DoS condition. Low severity — patch is available and exploitation requires specific conditions not observed in wild.
Active exploitation of SharePoint deserialization RCE. No SharePoint in current environment. Monitor if Microsoft 365 integration changes.
Threat actors targeting engineering and DevOps professionals on LinkedIn for credential harvesting and internal reconnaissance. No technical CVE.
SIM swap attacks targeting C-suite executives of Gulf fintech firms to bypass SMS-based MFA. Coordinate with mobile carriers to add SIM lock protections.
Privilege escalation in Linux kernel OverlayFS. PoC available but no weaponized exploit observed. Relevant to unpatched Ubuntu 20.04 systems.
Continued low-level HTTP/2 Rapid Reset DDoS activity against internet-facing web servers. Not a compromise vector — affects availability only.
Indicators of insider threat activity observed at a peer firm — admin credential sharing and excessive data export before employee departure. No technical CVE.
